2026-04-16T07:50:00.8775806Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8776371Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8776802Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8777159Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8777460Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8777690Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8777848Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8778025Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8778194Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8778417Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8778615Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8778892Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:50:00.8779149Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
